_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Ini ameddakel, qqim-d.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan tebna akken ad tili tamurt i yiwen wemdan kullu. Kullu tutlayt tezmer ad tawi uferdis n tisuγin.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Tabdart n tutlayin d lqima n Marks akka drus. Marks tiktutin n usekcem, mačči yimawlan.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Siγel Liana Banyan γer {{language}}. Awi {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Taddart n uzriz d yizen n tεulliwin
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Tutlayt n izazen -- uferdis ur yettudarkel.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Asγar n Amserwes: Mel d Tiγri n Tigawt-a
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Kull awal deg unekcum-agi yesεa imawlan. Anẓad n 26 n yismawen n tallit.
speakFriend.step1Body: Badu Uferdis n Tisuγin seg Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Siγel widen yettusentem. Uned Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Awali yekcem Marks ttwanafken IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Ini ameddakel, qqim-d."

languageSwitcher.tip: Seqdec tawrakin n tutlayin niḍen deg Tabburt n Durin akken ad tebdiḍ isallen ara ttwasṭen!
